testcase.classname: Todo API Tests GET /todos - should return all todos
testcase.name: Todo API Tests GET /todos - should return all todos

testcase.classname: Todo API Tests POST /todos - should create a new todo
testcase.name: Todo API Tests POST /todos - should create a new todo

testcase.classname: Todo API Tests POST /todos - should return 400 if task missing
testcase.name: Todo API Tests POST /todos - should return 400 if task missing

testcase.classname: Todo API Tests PUT /todos/:id - should update a todo
testcase.name: Todo API Tests PUT /todos/:id - should update a todo

testcase.classname: Todo API Tests DELETE /todos/:id - should delete a todo
testcase.name: Todo API Tests DELETE /todos/:id - should delete a todo
